member.name: T:GLTFast.Editor.EditorImportSettings
member.summary: Editor Import specific settings (not relevant at runtime)

member.name: F:GLTFast.Editor.EditorImportSettings.generateSecondaryUVSet
member.summary: Creates a secondary UV set on all meshes, if there is none present already. Often used for lightmaps.

member.name: T:GLTFast.Editor.BuiltInShaderGUI.BlendModeOption
member.summary: Subset of as not all configurations are supported

member.name: M:GLTFast.Utils.AsyncHelpers.RunSync(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Executes an async Task<T> method which has a void return value synchronously

member.name: M:GLTFast.Utils.AsyncHelpers.RunSync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}})
member.summary: Executes an async Task<T> method which has a T return type synchronously
